decisions.rationale: Optimizing for recall + precision + top5_accuracy to ensure real-world exam relevance.
Prevents 1-minute timeout blockers during generation by actively pinging port 11434 and silently spawning ollama serve via CREATE_NO_WINDOW if unresponsive.
Clearly isolates every mathematical component and heuristic decision in the codebase to make it completely accessible to beginners and new developers reading the repository.

next_action: Complete final signoff and merge Phase 3 MVC refactoring.
context_notes: We just wrote the extremely highly detailed README breaking down the 13 steps. Everything from the reliability loop tests down to Ollama auto-booting is implemented, validated, and documented. Ready for closure.
